download_notes: Planning reference identified via GLA referral and City Corporation committee report. Portal navigation not yet performed to retrieve keyVal or documents.
notes: The main planning application reference for 20 Fenchurch Street is 08/01061/FULMAJ, granting full planning permission for the tall building scheme. Developer: City of London Real Property Company Ltd (Land Securities and Canary Wharf Group), architect: Rafael Viñoly Architects; approved October 6, 2009 ([london.gov.uk] and committee report) ([london.gov.uk](https://www.london.gov.uk/sites/default/files/public%3A/public%3A/PAWS/media_id_1236/20_fenchurch_street_report.pdf?utm_source=openai)). Built as 38‑storey, 160 m office tower with sky garden, completed in 2014–2015 ([en.wikipedia.org](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/20_Fenchurch_Street?utm_source=openai)). Next step: navigate the City of London planning portal to locate application details and download PDF drawings.
